overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character in Western attire walking through a historic Victorian residential district at night. The scene transitions from paved streets lined with street lamps and iron fences to a waterfront area with a boathouse, then into open grassy fields.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with iron fences and Victorian mansions

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a wet paved street lined with wrought iron fences and glowing street lamps

entered.detail: black wrought iron fence running along the left side of the street
cast iron street lamp with warm yellow glow
large two-story wooden Victorian house with lit windows
wet asphalt street reflecting the street lamps

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a wet residential street at night, passing wrought iron fences and street lamps. A large Victorian mansion looms ahead on the right, with warm light glowing from its windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow walled street with overhead tree canopy

events.description: street narrows as iron fences give way to stone walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow corridor formed by stone walls and overhead trees

entered.detail: tall stone wall replacing the iron fence on the left
tall stone wall on the right side of the street
tree branches forming a canopy over the narrow street

segments.scene_description: The street narrows into a walled corridor with stone walls on both sides and trees forming an overhead canopy. The character continues walking on the wet pavement as the street becomes more enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront area with boathouse and wooden dock

events.description: transition from paved street to grassy area approaching the waterfront
green boathouse with lit interior comes into view on the left

agents.ego_description: walking across grass toward a waterfront boathouse and wooden dock extending over water

entered.detail: small building with green painted doors and a lit exterior lamp
wooden pier structure extending over the water
calm dark water reflecting the night sky
grassy terrain replacing the paved street

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the walled street and enters an open waterfront area. A green boathouse stands on the left while a wooden dock extends over the dark water. The ground transitions from pavement to grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy field with scattered trees approaching residential area

events.description: leaving the waterfront behind and entering open grass field

agents.ego_description: walking through a grassy field with scattered trees toward a distant house with lit windows

entered.detail: individual trees dotting the grassy landscape
house with warm lights visible in the distance
narrow dirt trail through the grass

segments.scene_description: The character moves away from the waterfront into an open grassy field. Scattered trees dot the landscape as the character follows a dirt path toward a distant house with glowing windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy Victorian residential district that gradually opens into a dark, rural landscape. It begins on a wet street lined with wrought iron fences and street lamps, passing a large mansion with warm light glowing from its windows. As the character progresses, the street narrows into an enclosed corridor of stone walls and overhanging tree canopies before the path opens up into a waterfront area. The scene then shifts from pavement to grass, passing a green boathouse and a wooden dock extending over dark water. Finally, the camera moves away from the shore and across an open grassy field, following a dirt path toward a distant house with glowing windows.
